loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor as availability proxy and energy-derived estimates for runtime/service metrics — specific runtime counts and durations are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing average load percentage — run-hours and start counts are not measured by this asset's meter.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy, apparent energy, and power factor — per-phase energy and reliability metrics (MTBF/MTTR) are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power totals — event counts and per-phase breakdowns are not measured by this asset.
